§6Logistics & Transport: Railroads & Conveyors§f

§aConstruct automated cargo rail networks and conveyor belts to move items across your base!§f
Piping every single item across large distances is expensive. Building a dedicated railway or conveyor line is the ideal solution for transporting bulk resources.

§6Railroad Networks§f:
Lay down rails to connect your outposts to your processing hubs:
§b• Tracks§f: Craft standard tracks, intersections, curves, slopes, and crossings to route your trains around terrain.
§b• Locomotives§f: Powered train engines that pull or push cargo carts along the tracks.
§b• Cargo & Fluid Carts§f: Carts containing large chest inventories or §e64,000 mB§f fluid tanks.

§6Cart Loaders & Unloaders§f:
Automate the loading and unloading of trains at stations:
§b• Cart Item Loader§f: Automatically transfers items from adjacent storage containers into cargo carts. Operates at a speed of §e4 items per tick§f.
§b• Fluid Loader§f: Automatically pumps fluids in and out of fluid carts.

§6Conveyor Belts§f:
For short-distance, block-to-block item automation:
§b• Conveyors§f: Move items placed on them in a straight line, rising or falling to match levels. Can be connected to inserters and hoppers to feed processing machines directly.
